$schema_note:
Pre-Contract Gate (Gate 4) per AKB_Deal_Flow_Orchestrator_Spec §4. 24 items. Highest-risk gate — runs when a PA arrives for signing, BEFORE Alex signs anything. This is the gate spec §13 Test 1 (Briyana 5/12) centers on: would have caught PC-08 blank EMD escrow, PC-20 sqft variance, PC-22 negative spread on PA-final numbers.

Phase 1 scope: 6 items fire real (PC-16 TN check, PC-17 CMA, PC-20 partial sqft, PC-22 partial recompute, PC-23 buyer pipeline, PC-24 composite). Other 18 items return data_missing pending DocuSign MCP integration. The gate blocks on every PA until DocuSign wires in — that's the principle-correct default.

Phase 2 (DocuSign integration): pa_document source dispatcher pulls envelope + form fields + attachments. Each PC-0X check reads from the parsed envelope. Inviolable items (PC-05 inspection contingency, PC-16 Memphis assignability) override-resistant per spec §7.
source: Orchestrator spec §4 Gate 4 + Briefing §3 hardcoded inviolable rules

items.description: Pull PA + all attached docs (disclosures, addenda)
items.pass_criteria: DocuSign envelope retrieved with all attachments enumerated. Phase 1: data_missing pending DocuSign MCP wire-in.

items.description: Verify sale price matches negotiated agreement
items.pass_criteria: PA sale_price field == agreed counter price from latest accepted-counter in negotiation thread. Phase 1: data_missing.

items.description: Verify buyer entity = AKB Solutions LLC and/or assigns
items.pass_criteria: PA buyer_entity field matches one of buyer_entity_acceptable_variants. Phase 1: data_missing.

items.description: Verify cash financing box checked
items.pass_criteria: PA financing_type = 'cash'. Phase 1: data_missing.

items.description: Verify inspection contingency present (INVIOLABLE — never waived per Briefing §3)
items.pass_criteria: PA includes inspection contingency clause. Override is NOT permitted per spec §7. Phase 1: data_missing.

items.description: Verify inspection period within [5, 10] days
items.pass_criteria: PA inspection_period_days within inspection_period_min_days..inspection_period_max_days. Phase 1: data_missing.

items.description: Verify closing date ≥ 14 days from sign date
items.pass_criteria: PA closing_date - sign_date >= closing_date_min_days_from_sign. Phase 1: data_missing.

items.description: Verify EMD escrow holder = title company (not broker)
items.pass_criteria: PA emd_escrow_holder is a title company, not a broker. Phase 1: data_missing.

items.description: Verify EMD amount reasonable (≤1% sale price)
items.pass_criteria: PA emd_amount / sale_price <= emd_max_pct_of_sale_price. Phase 1: data_missing.

items.description: Verify possession terms (at closing default)
items.pass_criteria: PA possession_terms == 'at_closing' or equivalent. Phase 1: data_missing.

items.description: Verify lead paint disclosure if built pre-1978
items.pass_criteria: If listing.year_built < 1978, PA includes lead paint disclosure. Phase 1: data_missing.

items.description: Verify all required attachments present
items.pass_criteria: Envelope includes PA + all state-required disclosures + any negotiated addenda. Phase 1: data_missing.

items.description: Verify NO blank dollar fields in PA
items.pass_criteria: Every currency form field on the PA is filled in (no blanks). Phase 1: data_missing.

items.description: Cross-reference PA terms vs negotiation thread
items.pass_criteria: PA price, EMD, inspection period, closing date all match what was negotiated in thread. Phase 1: data_missing (PA side).

items.description: Verify per-state assignment clause requirements
items.pass_criteria: PA includes state-required assignment language per listing.state. Phase 1: data_missing.

items.description: Verify Memphis assignability check (if TN — INVIOLABLE per spec §7)
items.pass_criteria: If listing.state in tn_assignability_states, surface 'PA must include Memphis-compliant assignment language' as informational requirement. Override NOT permitted.

items.description: Pull current CMA for property
items.pass_criteria: RentCast returned >=1 comparable

items.description: Verify ownership of record matches PA seller name
items.pass_criteria: PA seller_name matches county property records. Phase 1: data_missing (no records source + PA pending).

items.description: Pull title prelim status (if available)
items.pass_criteria: Title prelim ordered or in-progress. Phase 1: data_missing — title workflow is manual.

items.description: Verify Sqft from CMA matches PA / our model
items.pass_criteria: |listing.buildingSqFt - median(comp.squareFootage)| / median <= sqft_variance_block_pct AND |PA.sqft - median| <= sqft_variance_block_pct. Phase 1: partial — listing vs CMA real, PA side data_missing.

items.description: Flag any open liens > sale price
items.pass_criteria: Open liens total <= sale price. Phase 1: data_missing — no lien source.

items.description: Recompute end-buyer math with PA-final numbers
items.pass_criteria: Current Pricing Agent inputs produce non-negative spread + Your_MAO. Phase 1: partial — uses current listing inputs (PA-final data_missing).

items.description: Buyer pipeline check: ≥3 active buyers in this ZIP
items.pass_criteria: Count of Buyers where Buyer_Active_Flag = true AND (listing.zip in preferred_zip_codes OR listing.city in preferred_cities) >= buyer_pipeline_min_in_zip

items.description: Final confidence score — composite pass-route (≥80 recommend sign, 60-79 human review, <60 STOP)
items.pass_criteria: Composite of all upstream checks. Phase 1: data_missing — most upstream checks pending DocuSign integration. Surface partial signal + 'do not sign until DocuSign wired'.
